commands.review_summary:
The PR makes `sessions_send` accept `SendMessage`, `content`, and `text` aliases, normalizes the first non-empty alias into `message`, and updates regression coverage plus prompt snapshots.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +63. Total +75 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main and v2026.5.27 require `message` in the sessions-send schema and read it as required before dispatch, so a `SendMessage`-only call is source-reproducible as a validation rejection.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to choose the canonical PR in the duplicate fix cluster and let normal checks finish; there is no narrow ClawSweeper repair target in this branch.

target.title: fix #88146: [Bug]: send_to_task rejects model-generated `SendMessage` body instead of normalizing to `message` (A2A broken for Anthropic/Pi agents; sibling of #84079)
target.body:
## Summary

- Allow `sessions_send` / `send_to_task` to accept model-generated body aliases: `SendMessage`, `content`, and `text`.
- Normalize the first non-empty alias into the canonical `message` field before dispatching the agent run.
- Add regression coverage for the schema shape and alias execution path.

Closes #88146.

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed:** A `sessions_send` tool call with `SendMessage` now passes the real tool schema boundary and is normalized into the outgoing agent `message` payload instead of being rejected for a missing `message` property.
- **Real environment tested:** Patched worktree `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-88146`; isolated OpenClaw dev gateway on `ws://127.0.0.1:19011`; isolated `OPENCLAW_HOME=/tmp/openclaw-dev-issue-88146`.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:** Started the dev gateway with `OPENCLAW_REPO=/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-88146` and `OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PORT=19011`; queried gateway health with `node openclaw.mjs --dev gateway call health --url ws://127.0.0.1:19011 --token mytoken123 --json`; ran `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-88146-evidence/sessions-send-alias-proof.ts`, which imports the patched `createSessionsSendTool`, calls it with `SendMessage` and no canonical `message`, and sends through the real gateway via `callGateway`.
- **Evidence after fix:** `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-88146-evidence/sessions-send-alias-proof-after-snapshots.log`; `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-88146-evidence/vitest-agents-core-openclaw-tools-sessions-after-snapshots.log`; `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-88146-evidence/tsgo-core-test-after-snapshots.log`; `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-88146-evidence/prompt-snapshots-check-after-snapshot-update.log`.
- **Observed result after fix:** Runtime proof reports `schemaAllowsMissingMessage: true`, `schemaHasSendMessageAlias: true`, gateway methods `sessions.resolve` and `agent`, final status `accepted`, session key `agent:main:main`, and `runIdPresent: true`; prompt snapshots are current after adding the alias fields to the tool schema.
- **What was not tested:** A live Anthropic/Pi model naturally choosing the alias and live Discord delivery were not tested; the proof injects the rejected `SendMessage` shape from the issue and verifies the patched tool schema and dispatch boundary.
- **Target test file:** `src/agents/openclaw-tools.sessions.test.ts`

## Regression Test Plan

- `pnpm --dir /media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-88146 prompt:snapshots:check`
- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_INCLUDE_FILE=/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-88146-evidence/20260530-vitest-include.json pnpm --dir /media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-88146 exec node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents-core.config.ts`
- `pnpm --dir /media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-88146 tsgo:core:test`

## Root Cause

- **Root cause:** #84079 added alias normalization for the channel `message` tool, but `sessions_send` still required the canonical `message` property at its own schema boundary. Anthropic/Pi-backed agents can emit the body as `SendMessage`, so those calls failed validation before `sessions_send` could execute. The schema now admits the common aliases and the execution path canonicalizes them before reading `message` as required.
target.author: zhangguiping-xydt
